queries.question: Provide a list of the screenwriters as well as a list of the playwrights but only who are from American Film Institute.
queries.sql:
SELECT Screenwriter.name
FROM Education JOIN Screenwriter ON Education.id = Screenwriter.educationId
UNION
SELECT Playwright.name
FROM Education JOIN Playwright ON Education.id = Playwright.educationId
WHERE Education.institution = "American Film Institute"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?education a :Education .
    ?screenwriter a :Screenwriters .
    ?screenwriter p:hasEducation ?education .
    ?screenwriter p:name ?name .
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?education a :Education .
    ?playwright a :Playwrights .
    ?playwright p:hasEducation ?education .
    ?playwright p:name ?name .
    ?education p:institution ?institution_f .
    FILTER(STR(?institution_f) = "American Film Institute")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Show the screenwriters and playwrights from American Film Institute.
queries.sql:
SELECT Screenwriter.name
FROM Education JOIN Screenwriter ON Education.id = Screenwriter.educationId
WHERE Education.institution = "American Film Institute"
UNION
SELECT Playwright.name
FROM Education JOIN Playwright ON Education.id = Playwright.educationId
WHERE Education.institution = "American Film Institute"
